ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "num_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "website" TEXT /* University's official website URL */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the university based on evaluation metrics */,
  "entry_standards" INTEGER /* Entry standards score for prospective students */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score based on various performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_satisfaction" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university associated with the satisfaction score */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year the satisfaction survey was conducted */,
  "num_responses" INTEGER /* Number of student responses for the survey */,
  "faculty_rating" REAL /* Rating of faculty by students (scale 1-5) */,
  "facility_rating" REAL /* Rating of university facilities (scale 1-5) */,
  "satisfaction_score" REAL /* Satisfaction score from students (scale 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_satisfaction_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_metrics" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research metrics record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university associated with the research scores */,
  "research_funding" REAL /* Total research funding in USD */,
  "num_publications" INTEGER /* Number of research publications */,
  "citation_index" REAL /* Citation index score */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score based on research output metrics */,
  "intensity_score" REAL /* Research intensity score reflecting research efforts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduate_prospects" (
  "prospect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate prospect record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university associated with the graduate prospects score */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of graduates employed within six months */,
  "further_study_rate" REAL /* Percentage of graduates pursuing further study */,
  "prospect_score" REAL /* Graduate prospects score indicating employment and further study rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prospect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduate_prospects_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_rankings" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical ranking record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score for the university in that year */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the university in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitted_data" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university submitting data */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the data */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of data submission */,
  "data_file_url" TEXT /* URL to the submitted data file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Pending, Verified) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submitted_data_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submitted_data_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, university admin, consultant) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
